name: Lite-On Technology Corporation
summary: Lite-On Technology Corporation manufactures and markets computer software, hardware, peripherals, and components in Asia and internationally. It also offers monitors, multifunction and all-in-one printers, cameras, and Internet systems and image-processing equipment; information storage and processing equipment, electronic components, and office equipment; electronic coils, transformers, power suppliers, and electronic hardware parts; light-emitting diode products; electronic car products; and optical lens modules and optoelectronic components. In addition, it manufactures and sells medical equipment; photovoltaic devices, electronic components, telecommunications equipment, information technology equipment, semiconductor applications, general lighting, automotive electronics, and renewable energy products and systems; LED optical products; power supplies; image sensors and rectifiers; keyboards, display devices, printers, scanners, and computer cases; system products; mobile terminal equipment; mobile phone molds and assembly lines; power control and energy management products; plastic and computer peripheral products; optical disc drives; modules of automotive recorders; touch panels and rubber assembly products; maintenance equipment and precision instruments; and other electronic components. Further, the company engages in the wholesale, import and export, and installation of street and signal lights, scenery lights, and electronic components; and provision of technology consulting, market research and after-sales, energy technology, ODM, and automotive industry maintenance services. Additionally, it is involved in the electronic contract manufacturing; investment; solar energy engineering; and information outsourcing activities, as well as real estate management business. The company was founded in 1975 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.
